metric_notes.distinct_cmcd_sessions: Exact daily distinct CMCD sid values on FAST .ts rows. This is playback-session telemetry, not app queryStr session_id.
metric_notes.distinct_cmcd_content_ids: Exact daily distinct CMCD cid values on FAST .ts rows.
metric_notes.cmcd_reported_duration_hours: Sum of CMCD d= duration milliseconds converted to hours; only rows carrying CMCD contribute.
metric_notes.cmcd_sid_rows: Rows carrying a parseable CMCD sid.
metric_notes.raw_ts_rows: All FAST .ts rows for the platform/channel; use with cmcd_sid_rows for coverage.
